read.dek: The ceasefire is surface noise. The real argument is that America can lose in Iran and still use the war to cut China's energy throat, turn allies into vassals, make the Western Hemisphere a fortress, and sell a world at war the dollars, weapons, energy, and surveillance needed to keep the machine running.
read.thesis: The lecture reads the 2026 Iran war through the new American defense strategy. Peace through strength means fear, obedience, and a world ordered around American choke points. The United States does not need to conquer Iran or destroy China; it needs chaos around Iran, Russia, Europe, Japan, and the Middle East so everyone depends on American resources, American financing, and American permission to trade. The plan requires a war economy, a national draft, continuity through Trump, and an AI police state. It also contains its own failure: nationalism, corruption, and division force empires back into themselves.

opening.heading: Core Reading
opening.text: Start with the false calm. There has been a two-week ceasefire between Iran and the United States, and a peace treaty may be discussed in Islamabad. But the war will not end, because the war is not really about Trump's personal whim. It is a way for the United States to preserve empire by controlling energy, sea lanes, dollars, and the choke points through which China and Russia must breathe.

beats.heading: America Moves Into Total War
beats.summary: Oil fires, budget expansion, draft registration, and the defense strategy all point toward mobilization.

paragraphs.text: The world energy system is already being attacked. Refineries burn across countries, food and energy inputs rise, and the useful question is not who is morally innocent but who has means, motive, and opportunity. The answer is deliberately cautious: probably Russia, probably America, maybe both. The important point is that reducing global oil supply benefits actors who can sell energy or force dependence.

beats.summary: America does not need to own every ocean; it needs the passages that force trade into dependence.

paragraphs.text: The Western Hemisphere becomes the fortress that sells to the world at war. America supplies energy, resources, weapons, and financing, then lends the dollars needed to buy them. beats.heading: The Plan Fails By Empire's Own Laws
beats.summary: The world-war design runs into nationalism abroad and corruption and division at home.

paragraphs.text: The goal is a world forever at war: China against Japan, Iran against Israel and the GCC, Europe against Russia. America controls Hormuz, Malacca, Gibraltar, Panama, and the other keys, then rations resources to keep each region balanced. Too strong, you get less. Too weak, you get more.
